name: e-Racer
publisher: Funbox Media Ltd, ZOOM Platform Media
short_description: Feel the rush in e-Racer! A stylish GT arcade racer with dynamic tracks, weather challenges, and intense competition. Dominate championships, unlock upgrades, and race through unique locales. Master tight courses, leave rivals in the dust, and rise to the top!
detailed_description:
Feel the power and rush of e-Racer! A refreshing and stylish competitive GT arcade style racing game.

Blast through the game’s winding courses at break-neck speeds and push your vehicle to its limits!

Your opponents are hungry for a challenge, and you will have the means to give it to them with an arsenal of 8 different cars to unlock. Compete against challenging AI opponents or challenge your friends in the game’s robust network multiplayer.

Take on a diverse set of tracks in unique locales. Battle the elements in tracks with snow and rain cover. Test your skills and leave everyone in your dust!

Enter the game’s extensive Championship mode and race against 7 other drivers. Only the most skilled will advance to the next round. Do well, and you will win money for upgrades, as well as unlock bonus cars and tracks. Grab the wheel, put your foot to the floor, and see if you have what it takes!

Features:

  • Feel refreshing variety. Try racing different GT cars from big city locales to the middle of nowhere and everything in between. Unique locations include a multi-story car park, a storm drain network, a shopping mall and a quarry.

  • Damageable cars add to the visual spectacle and visceral satisfaction.

  • Realistic physics modelling for improved car handling and feel.

  • Test your skills in the championship, unlocking more tracks and cars as you go. Then, take your favorite vehicle into the ultimate challenge, a network e-racer showcase with your friends.

supported_languages: French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Polish, Russian, Latvian, Lithuanian, English
